## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (dependency updates, config changes)

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] Tested in browser — all affected pages render correctly
- [ ] Budget/financial calculations are accurate (if applicable)
- [ ] Role-based features work for correct roles (if applicable)

## Screenshots
If UI changes, include before/after screenshots.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style conventions
- [ ] I have not introduced new lint warnings
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have tested on both desktop and mobile viewports
